title: 皐月賞の後に・鬼の誕生

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin doesn't clinch the win at the
Satsuki Sho—the first race of the Classic Triple
Crown—but she mesmerizes the crowd with her
powerful performance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the stands is a young, redheaded girl who is
moved to tears by her incredible run.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin leaves the racecourse to hone her
skills and prepare for the next challenge—the
Japanese Derby.
